name: T Cell Receptor Activation
description: T-cell activation: TCR engagement of peptide-MHC plus CD28 costimulation triggers Lck/ZAP-70 signaling and the LAT signalosome, branching into Ca2+/NFAT, NF-kB, and MAPK pathways that drive IL-2 and clonal expansion; without costimulation the cell becomes anergic.

graph TD
    N1["TCR binds peptide-MHC"]
    N2["CD28 binds B7"]
    N3{"Costimulation present?"}
    N4["Anergy / no response"]
    N5["Lck phosphorylates ITAMs"]
    N6["ZAP-70 recruited"]
    N7["LAT signalosome"]
    N8["PLCg1: Ca2+/NFAT"]
    N9["Ras-MAPK / PKCt-NF-kB"]
    N10["IL-2 + activation genes"]
    N11["Clonal proliferation"]

    N9 --> N10
    N10 --> N11
